Sponsorships / Cratejoy

Cratejoy

miscellaneous
Affiliate
10% Commission
affiliate
Apply Now → Visit Website

Overview

Are you a blogger, social influencer, YouTuber or streamer? Then you’re in the right place!

Get access to top deals, evergreen and seasonal creative assets, new product releases, product catalogs, exclusive collections, custom landing pages, newsletters, and a dedicated team to help ramp up your affiliate marketing strategy.

Benefits

  • Tiered commissions on all boxes on the Cratejoy Marketplace
  • 10% Commission on select boxes
  • 60 Day Cookie - get paid for sales up to 60 days after the first click Cratejoy provides a decent affiliate program for anyone, not just streamers.
